items.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
items.summary: BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns.

items.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
items.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

items.title: Charge your entire everyday Apple kit on the go with this 65W Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank with lanyard cable down at $48 low
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you’ll find LISEN’s official B King storefront is offering its 10,000mAh 65W Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank for $47.99 shipped, once you enter promo code XX2HL3TA during checkout. That matches the Prime Day price it hit last month, bringing this latest model down from its $80 usual going rate. The white version is also on sale for $59.84 shipped with a relatively lighter deal, so you can pick between the two and grab one without paying the full price today. This is one of the more capable Qi2.2 25W power banks out there right now, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.title: 'Moment of joy' as Uganda discharges last Ebola patient
items.summary: The good news from Uganda comes as the WHO chief warns the virus in DR Congo is spreading fast.

items.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
items.summary: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world’s largest food-delivery platforms outside China.

items.title: LEGO’s 768-piece Horizon Adventures set with two minifigures + the Shell-Walker and Sawtooth is down at $29 right now
items.summary:
LEGO Horizon Adventures Aloy & Varl vs. Shell-Walker & Sawtooth set

Buy for $29 (Reg. $45)

What we love

Stacking up to 768 pieces, this LEGO Horizon Adventures set lets you recreate the adventures of the game’s protagonist, Aloy, and her friend Varl (both in minifigure form and complete with weapons), as they battle the Shell-Walker and Sawtooth. The Shell-Walker comes with posable legs and arms, as well as an articulable claw, while Sawtooth comes full articulated with opening jaws, a swiveling torso, while also having a posable neck, head, and legs. It makes a great addition to any collections for builders and gamers alike.

items.summary: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing […]

items.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
items.summary: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.

items.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
items.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

items.title: UK cops say arrest of two young hackers disrupted the operations of an infamous hacking group
items.summary: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair, two members of the prolific Scattered Spider hacking group, pleaded guilty and were sentenced to five years and six months in jail for hacking London’s metropolitan transit system.

items.title: Period tracker Stardust shares users’ health data with analytics firm, says Mozilla research
items.summary: One period tracker app tested by Mozilla was 'squeaky clean,' while another app was seen sharing users' health data with an analytics company, underscoring vast differences in user privacy among these apps.

items.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
items.summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

items.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
items.summary: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.

items.title: Sheryl Sandberg leads $10 million investment in AI-powered vehicle inspection service
items.summary: The startup, founded in 2021, lets enterprise customers use smartphones to scan and spot vehicle damage.
